changes: Contacts in the Address Book can now be assigned tags, allowing for more advanced filtering.
The Address Book can now link to individual / company websites.
Current search and filter parameters in the Address Book are retained while navigating the site.
Logging in now takes you to the page you were trying to access, rather than always going to '/admin'.
Added Resources and Changelog to backpages.
Contact emails now come from admin@darkslatetheatre.com.
Changed internal name for 'Bio' backpage to 'My Bio'.
New Dark Slate site launched at temporary GitHub address.
Home, About & Contact pages available on frontpages.
Inbox and My Bio available in admin backpages.
